overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character exploring Ancient Egyptian temple interiors, rooftops, and city streets. The character transitions from a columned temple chamber to outdoor urban environments with palm trees and monumental architecture before ascending a grand temple staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: Ancient Egyptian temple interior with sacred pool and decorated columns

events.description: character begins walking from standing position in shallow water
character exits the water onto dry stone floor
character approaches doorway leading to bright exterior

agents.ego_description: walking through shallow water in a columned temple hall, examining hieroglyphics and architecture before heading toward the exit

entered.detail: tall stone columns with blue and gold lotus capitals and colorful bands
stone walls covered in Egyptian hieroglyphic reliefs and paintings
shallow pool of green water reflecting the columns above
large bronze fire bowl on a tall stand
exit doorway leading to bright exterior light

segments.scene_description: The character stands in a shallow sacred pool inside an Ancient Egyptian temple, surrounded by massive decorated columns and hieroglyphic walls. After wading through the water, the character walks across the stone floor toward a doorway leading outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple rooftop terrace with panoramic views of city and river

events.description: exits dark interior to bright sunlit rooftop terrace
character pauses to look over edge of rooftop into courtyard below
camera pans to reveal distant Nile river and desert landscape

agents.ego_description: walking across the stone rooftop of the temple, looking down into courtyards and out toward the river and distant landscape

entered.detail: light-colored stone tiles of the temple rooftop
massive decorated walls of the temple structure with hieroglyphics
large ceremonial bronze fire bowl on the rooftop
wide river visible in the distance beyond the temple
palm trees lining the riverbank in the distance

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto the temple rooftop, the character walks across sunlit stone pavement with views of the massive temple facade and the distant Nile river. Large bronze braziers stand on the roof as the character looks down into interior courtyards and out toward the palm-lined riverbank.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront dock transitioning to sandy city street

events.description: hard cut to misty waterfront location with different lighting atmosphere
moving from stone dock to sandy street with palm trees
passing large sphinx statue at street corner

agents.ego_description: walking along the stone waterfront promenade then through sandy streets lined with palm trees and Egyptian buildings

notable_agents.action: civilian standing by the water watching the character pass
pedestrian walking along the dock in the same direction

entered.detail: cobblestone dock along the river edge with mooring bollards
calm water with atmospheric mist rising from the surface
white mud-brick structures with colorful banners and flags
tall palm trees lining the street and waterfront
large stone sphinx statue at street intersection

segments.scene_description: The scene shifts to a misty waterfront dock where the character walks along stone paving before transitioning to sandy city streets. Egyptian buildings with white walls and colorful banners line the path, while palm trees provide shade. Other civilians are visible walking along the waterfront and streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand temple staircase flanked by sphinx guardians

events.description: beginning ascent of wide stone staircase
reaching top of stairs approaching temple entrance with red flags

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide stone staircase flanked by sphinx statues toward the temple entrance

notable_agents.action: civilian climbing stairs ahead of the character

entered.detail: wide steep staircase made of large sandstone blocks
massive stone sphinx statues lining both sides of the staircase
tall temple gateway with red banners and flags
seated lion statues at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a monumental stone staircase flanked by massive sphinx statues. At the top, a grand temple entrance with red flags and seated lion statues awaits. Another civilian climbs the stairs ahead as the character approaches the temple pylon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the secluded depths of a sacred temple interior out into the sprawling, sun-drenched urban landscape of an ancient Egyptian city. It begins with the character wading through a shallow pool surrounded by massive decorated columns and hieroglyphic walls before crossing a stone floor toward the light of an exit. As the character emerges onto a rooftop, the enclosed space opens into a wide vista of sunlit pavement, bronze braziers, and a distant view of the Nile river. The scene then shifts toward a misty waterfront dock and sandy city streets lined with white-walled buildings and colorful banners, where palm trees and civilians populate the path. Finally, the camera follows the character as they ascend a monumental stone staircase flanked by sphinx statues, leading toward a grand temple entrance adorned with red flags and seated lions.
